sections.title: Technique
sections.default: AP view of the pelvis was obtained.

sections.title: Findings
sections.normal_text: The pelvic ring is intact. No fracture or dislocation is identified. Both hip joints are normally located with maintained joint spaces. The sacrum, coccyx and sacroiliac joints appear normal. The visualized lumbar vertebrae are intact. No soft tissue abnormality is identified.

sections.title: Impression
sections.normal_text: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the pelvis.

few_shot_normal.input: pelvis intact, hip joints normal, sacrum normal

output.findings: The pelvic ring is intact. No fracture or dislocation is identified. Both hip joints are normally located with maintained joint spaces. The sacrum, coccyx and sacroiliac joints appear normal. No soft tissue abnormality is identified.
output.impression: No fracture or significant radiological abnormality of the pelvis.
